strategy.tone: slightly awkward genuine compliment — stands out from polished AI outreach
anti_patterns: Do not use 'I came across your profile'
Do not use 'I was impressed by'
Do not mention AI or automation
Do not pitch in the note — curiosity only
Do not use 'reach out' or 'touch base'
Do not mention 'digital marketing' or 'web design' explicitly
strategy.upgrade_path: Once profile data available from HANDS: replace generic with post_reference (highest impact) or headline type. Upgrade priority: 44 > 42 > 4 > 52 > 8. HANDS: write data/linkedin_profiles.json after each search — include last_post_date and last_post_text so BRAIN can judge upgrade potential.

summary.escalation: HANDS has not returned linkedin_profiles.json for FOUR consecutive BRAIN runs. All 13 notes are generic. Post_reference upgrades are the highest-impact improvement available to this pipeline — a personalised note referencing a recent post achieves ~3-4x higher connection acceptance rates than generic.
